english_query: the idea that the right thing is usually between two wrong things
ugf_response: First, we look at two ways to do a thing that are both bad. One way is to do too much, and the other way is to do too little. Both of these ways lead to bad things happening. Then we think about a way that is not too much and not too little. This middle way is often the best way. This means that the right thing is found in the space between the two wrong things. We can see this in many parts of life. For one case, being too scared is bad, and not being scared at all is also bad. The right size of fear keeps us safe but lets us try new things. So, we learn to look for the middle path when we face hard choices. This helps us avoid the trouble that comes from going to either side.

english_query: how to tell when someone is changing what was really said
ugf_response:
Imagine a person tells a story to a group of people. Later, that same person tells the story to someone else, but the story is not the same. The words are different. The things that happened are changed. This can happen when someone wants to make themselves look good or when they want to make another person look bad. It can also happen when someone forgets what they said because their mind is not clear.

The hard question is how we can know if a person is telling the truth about what was said before. How can we know if they are changing the words with a plan to make us believe something that is not true? This is hard because we cannot go back in time to hear the first story again. We only have what the person tells us now.

Some people might say that we should only believe what we see with our own eyes and ears. If we did not hear the first story, we should not believe the second story. They think that if we did not see it, we cannot know if it is true. This way of thinking keeps us safe from being made to believe a lie, but it also means we might miss things that are true.

Other people might look at the person telling the story. They might look at how the person acts. If the person looks like they are not telling the truth, or if they always tell stories that make them look like a great and good person, then these people will not believe them. They use what they know about the person to make a guess. This can be good, but it can also be bad if we decide we do not like a person and then we think everything they say is a lie, even when they are telling the truth.

There are also people who look at all the stories together. If many people tell the same story, then it is probably true. If one person tells a story that is very different from what everyone else says, then that person might be changing what happened. This way of thinking uses many voices to find the truth. But sometimes, a group of people can all be wrong together, and the one person who is different might actually be the one telling the truth.

english_query: how taking care of others is a kind of work that matters
ugf_response: First, we see that when a person looks after another person, that thing we do is a kind of work. Then we notice that this work is not just a thing we do for fun, but it changes how the other person feels and can change how the whole group lives. Next, we think about why this work matters. It matters because it helps the other person stay safe, stay not hurt, and feel good, and that in turn helps the whole group be strong. Then we see that the person who does the care work also gets something back, like a feeling of being needed or a feeling of being close to others. Finally, we understand that care for others is a real part of work that changes lives and makes the whole group work better together.

english_query: the problem with thinking only two choices exist when there are more
ugf_response:
The person is telling us about a way of thinking that is bad. The first idea they give us is that sometimes people think there are only two ways to do something or two things that can be true. They say that people often see only two paths when there are actually many more paths that could be taken. This is the part that is true. In our world, things are often not just one thing or the other thing. There is often a middle way or many other ways that we do not see at first.

The second idea is what they think follows from this. They think that if we only see two ways, we will make a bad choice. We might pick one way and think it is the only way to go, but we miss the best way because it was not one of the two ways we saw. This means our way of thinking is not good because it makes us miss the truth and the best way to act.

The third part is whether their way of thinking is good. Their way of thinking is good because it helps us see that we must look for more than just two ways. If we only look at two ways, we are not using our heads well. We are not looking at everything that is there. To use our heads well, we must look at all the things that could be true. If we do not do this, we will be wrong many times. Their thinking is good because it tells us to be more careful when we make a choice.

english_query: the way to help yourself think about hard questions step by step
ugf_response:
When you want to know something that is hard to know, you must not try to find the answer all at once. If you try to do too much, your head will feel full and you will not find the truth. Instead, you must take the big thing and make it into many small things.

First, you must look at the big thing and find the smallest parts that make it up. If you want to know why something happens, do not look at the whole world. Look at one small piece of it. Once you see that piece, ask yourself what it is doing.

Second, you must look at how these small parts work with each other. You can see how the first small piece touches the second small piece. You can see if the first piece makes the second piece move or change. You must do this for every piece until you see the whole picture made of these small parts.

Third, you must check if what you think is true. You should not just believe what you want to believe. You must look for things that show you are wrong. If you find something that does not fit, you must change how you think about the parts. You must go back and look at the small parts again.

The thing after the third thing is this. You must be careful not to let your own feelings change what you see. Sometimes we want something to be true so much that we see things that are not there. To stop this, you must act as if you are looking at a thing from far away. You must look at the parts as they are, not as you wish they were.

If you do this, you will not be lost in the big thing. You will move through the small things one by one. By taking care of each small thing, you will slowly find the answer to the big thing.

english_query: how to find the hidden parts of someone's case
ugf_response: Please give me the words you want me to look at. I am ready to tell you about the things that are true in what you say, the things that the person thinks are true because of those things, and if their way of thinking is good or bad. I will use only the words you told me are okay to use. I will not use any special marks or ways of writing that use many small parts. I will write in long ways of writing that go one after the other. First, I will look at what is true. Second, I will look at what they think comes after those true things. Third, I will look at if their way of thinking is good. Please send the words you want me to read.

english_query: the problem with thinking only two choices exist when there are more
ugf_response: When a person looks at a situation and says that there are only two ways to go, that can cause a lot of trouble. First, the mind may stop looking for any other ways. The mind can get stuck in a small space and not see other things that could be done. When the mind only sees two ways, it may think that one of them must be right and the other must be wrong. That can make the person feel angry or sad if the way they do not like is the one they have to take. It can also make them fight with other people who think the other way is the right one. Second, when there are more ways than two, missing the extra ways can lead to a worse end. If a person only looks at the two ways and picks the one that seems best, they may miss a third way that would have been even better. The person may end up with a bad end for them or for the ones around them, simply because they did not see the third way. Third, thinking that only two ways are there can keep a group from working together. If each person in a group thinks the other side has only the other way, they may not try to find a middle way that could help both sides. The group may stay in a fight instead of finding a new way that works for many. To avoid this trouble, it helps to keep the mind open. When you hear a problem, try to ask yourself if there is a thing you could do that is not the first way and not the second way. Look for any other ways, even if they seem small or new. Talk with other people and ask them what they think could be done. Often, when you hear the idea of another person, you will see a new way that you did not think of before. By doing this, you give yourself more chances to find a good end. You also make it easier to work with other people, because you are not stuck on the idea that there are only two ways. The mind stays able to move, the group stays calm, and the end can be better for everyone.

english_query: why who someone is to you changes what you should do for them
ugf_response: First, we must think about how we act toward the people around us. We do not act the same way toward every person we see. For some people, we give much of our time and our things. For other people, we give very little. We must ask why this is so. We see that the way we act rests on how we feel about the person. This feeling is the way we see that person in our own hearts and minds. If we see a person as someone we love, like a mother or a child, we feel a strong need to help them. This feeling makes us want to do things for them that we would not do for a person we do not know. The way we see them changes the way we choose to act. Second, we can see that the things we do for people are not just about the things themselves. They are about the way two people are joined together. If the way they are joined is strong, the things we do are more important. If the way they are joined is not strong, the things we do are less important. This means that the person is not just a thing in the world, but a person who has a place in our life. Third, we see that what we do tells us who we are and who they are to us. If we help someone because they are a friend, we are showing that we are a friend. If we help someone because they are a stranger, we are showing that we are a kind person to everyone. So, the person you are to me changes what I should do for you because the way we are joined tells me how much weight to give to your needs. The person you are to me changes the way I think about what is right to do.

english_query: how to pick the best reason out of many that could be right
ugf_response:
The first thing they say is that there are many different reasons that could be right about a question. They say that each of those reasons might be true in some way and that we can not just pick one without looking at them. This part is the thing they say about what we have in hand, and it is the thing they say that can be true if we really do have more than one possible reason.  

The second thing they think comes after that is that we can find the best reason by looking at a few things. They say we should see which reason fits the facts we see the most, which reason is the most easy to understand, and which reason helps us get the thing we want. They also say that if a reason does all those things better than the others, then it should be the one we pick. This part is the idea about what should happen if the first thing is true.  

The third thing we look at is whether the way they think works well. The steps they give do make sense in a simple way: looking at how well a reason fits the facts helps us stay close to what we see, choosing a most easy to understand reason helps us not get lost, and choosing a reason that helps us get what we want keeps the reason able to be used. When those three checks are used together, they usually lead us toward a reason that is more able to be right. The thinking is good as long as we really do check each reason with those three checks and do not leave out any reason that might also fit. If we follow the steps, we are less able to be wrong about a reason that only sounds nice but does not fit the facts. So in the end the way of picking a reason is a way that makes sense to try to find the best one among many.

english_query: why someone's character does not decide if their point is right
ugf_response:
The person starts with the first idea. They say that how a person lives and how they act is not the same thing as what they say is true. They say that a bad person can still say things that are true. They also say that a good person can say things that are not true. This part is true. The truth of a thing does not change because of the person who says it. A thing is true or it is not true all by itself.

The second idea is what they think follows from the first idea. They think that we should not look at the person to see if their words are right. They think we must look only at the words themselves. If we look at the person instead of the words, we might think something is true just because we like the person. Or we might think something is not true just because we do not like them. This is what they think happens when we do not follow their first idea.

The third idea is about whether their thinking is good. Their thinking is good because it helps us find what is true. If we only listen to people we like, we will not see the truth when it comes from someone we do not like. Their way of thinking keeps us from doing something that is not right. It keeps us from letting our feelings about a person change how we see the world. This is a good way to think if we want to know what is real.

english_query: the problem of spending more just because you already spent a lot
ugf_response:
Imagine you go to a place to buy things. You decide to buy the first thing. Then you buy a second thing. Then you buy a third thing. After you have given away much of your money, you find yourself wanting to buy even more things. You might think that because you have already given away much of your money, you must keep giving it away. You feel that the money you already spent is gone, so you might as well spend more.

The hard question is this: Is it right to keep spending money just because you have already spent a lot? Does the money you spent before change what you should do right now?

Some people might say that you should stop. They think that every time you buy something, it is a new choice. They say that the money you spent when the sun went down and came up again is gone and cannot be brought back. Because of this, they say you should only buy something now if it is a good idea for you in this time. They believe that the time that has gone by should not tell you what to do in the time that is here. They want you to look at each new thing by itself.

Other people might say that you should keep going. They might think that if you stop now, then all the money you spent before was a wrong thing. They feel that if they spend more, they might make the first wrong thing look like a good choice by adding more to it. This is a way of thinking where you try to make a big wrong thing look like a good choice by adding more to it. They feel that the time before and the time now are tied together in one big thing.

The first group thinks about each moment as a new start. The second group thinks about the whole story from the beginning to the end. The first group wants to save what is left. The second group wants to make sure the whole story makes sense.

english_query: how to decide whose good matters and how much
ugf_response:
Person 1: How do we choose whose good matters more?  
Person 2: First we think about who will feel the most big change if we act.  
Person 1: What do you mean by most big change?  
Person 2: It means the thing that will go from bad to good in a big way.  
Person 1: Do we only look at how big the change is?  
Person 2: We also look at how many people are part of that change.  
Person 1: What if one person has a very big need but many people have a small need?  
Person 2: Then we try to add the small changes together and see if they add up to more than the one big change.  
Person 1: Is there an easy way to do that?  
Person 2: We can make a group of notes, write each need, give each a number for its size, then add the numbers.

english_query: the problem of using what was to guess what will be
ugf_response:
We look at things that happened in the past to guess what will happen in the future. This is how we live our lives. We see that the sun comes up every morning, so we think it will come up tomorrow. We see that fire is hot, so we think it will be hot next time we touch it. We use what we know from before to make a plan for what is coming.

The hard question is this. Can we ever be sure that what happened before will happen again? Just because something happened a very large number of times does not mean it must happen one more time. There might be a thing we do not see that changes everything. We are trying to use the past to see a part of the world that has not even happened yet. We are trying to see around a corner that is not there.

Some people say that this way of thinking is the only way to know anything. They think that the world works in a way that stays the same. They say that if we look at enough things from before, we can find the way the world works. They believe that the past gives us the way to see the future. To them, the past is a map that shows us where we are going.

Other people say this way of thinking is not good. They say that we cannot know for sure. They say that just because a thing has happened many times, it does not make it a law of the world. They worry that we are only seeing what we want to see. They think we might be wrong because we do not know all the things that could change. They say we must be careful because the next thing might be something we have never seen before.

english_query: why treating people as things to use is always wrong
ugf_response: First, we must think about what it means to be a person. A person is a living being that can feel, can think, and has their own wants and ways of being. Second, we must think about what it means to be a thing. A thing is something that does not have its own wants and only is for helping someone else. Third, we look at what happens when we use a person like a thing. When we do this, we take their wants and their life and make them serve only our own wants. The thing after the third, we see that this is not good because it makes the person seem as if they do not matter. The thing after the thing after the third, we see that if we do this, we are saying that our own wants are the only ones that are real. The thing after the thing after the thing after the third, we see that every person has the same right to be seen as a person and not a thing. The thing after the thing after the thing after the thing after the third, we see that if we use a person as a thing, we are breaking the way we should act toward all people. Finally, we see that because every person is a being with their own life, using them only to get what we want is always wrong.

english_query: how the kind of person you are matters more than following rules
ugf_response: First, we see that a set of words that tell us what to do in a certain case can be followed by a person just by reading those words and doing what they say. Then, we think about what makes a person good and we find that a person is made of many parts such as how they feel, how they think, how they act and how they care about what is right for others. Next, we notice that a set of words that tell us what to do may not fit every situation because the world can change and because the words may have been made by people who did not see everything. Then, we see that a person who cares about what is right can look at those words and ask if they fit the real need and can decide to change or bend the words when it would hurt or be not right. After that, we see that this caring and thinking is more important than just doing the words because it can keep people safe and can keep things right even when the words are not perfect. This means that the way you are inside – the way you think, feel and act with care – matters more than only following the words that tell us what to do.

english_query: the question of what we owe to people we will never meet
ugf_response:
Person 1: I wonder, what should we give to people we will never see?  

Person 2: We can think of it as a need to keep things good for them, like clean air, safe water, and a just chance to live.  

Person 1: But how can we know what they need if we never meet them?  

Person 2: We can look at what helps all of us now and try to keep that going, because what helps us now will also help them later.  

Person 1: Does that mean we have to change how we act today?  

Person 2: Yes, we can try to use less things we throw away, grow more trees, and make laws that keep the world nice for the next ones.  

Person 1: Some people say that is just a feeling, not a real need. What do you think?  

Person 2: I think it is a real need because if we take too much now, there will be less for those who come after, and that can make life hard for them.  

Person 1: So the thing we need to give is to keep the world in a good shape?  

Person 2: Yes, we need to keep the world in a shape that lets the next ones live, learn, and be happy.

english_query: why what you already believe changes how you see new things
ugf_response:
You have a way of seeing the world that lives inside your head. This way of seeing is made of all the things you think are true. These things are your beliefs. When you meet a new thing, you do not see it for what it is in a way that is completely free. Instead, you look at the new thing through the way you already think about everything.

Think about it this way. Imagine you are wearing a pair of glasses that are a deep blue color. Because of these glasses, every new thing you look at will look blue to you. If you see a white wall, it looks blue. If you see a green leaf, it looks blue. The thing itself is not blue, but the way you see it is blue because of the glasses you are already wearing. Your beliefs are like those blue glasses.

First, your brain wants to keep things easy. It is very hard for the brain to change how it thinks. It is much easier for the brain to make a new thing be the same as what you already know. When you see something new, your brain looks for ways to make that new thing look like what you already know. If the new thing is the same as what you know, your brain says, "See? I was right all along." This makes you feel good and keeps your mind at rest.

Second, your brain sometimes tries to push away things that do not fit. If you see something new that says what you think is wrong, your brain might act like it did not see it at all. Or, your brain might find a way to say that the new thing is not true or is not important. This is because if the new thing is true, then your old way of thinking might be wrong. If your old way of thinking is wrong, it makes your brain feel like it is in a place where it can be hurt or where it cannot find its way.

So, when you look at a new idea, you are not seeing the idea by itself. You are seeing the idea joined with everything you thought before. This means that two people can look at the very same thing and see two different things. One person sees it one way because of what they believe, and the other person sees it another way because of what they believe. Your mind is not a clear window. It is a window that is already colored by your own thoughts.

english_query: why treating people as things to use is always wrong
ugf_response:
First, the first idea says that a person is not a thing that does not have thoughts and cannot feel, so it cannot be used the way we use a thing that helps us get work done. A person has thoughts, feelings, and a life that can be hurt or helped. The first idea also says that when we see a person only as a thing that does not have thoughts and cannot feel, we forget that the person can feel pain, can want things, and can have a need for care.

Second, the second idea says that because a person is not a thing that does not have thoughts and cannot feel, it is always wrong to act toward a person as if they were a thing that does not have thoughts and cannot feel that we can use. From the first idea it follows that if we use a person like a thing that does not have thoughts and cannot feel, we will cause hurt, we will make the person feel less seen as good, and we will make it harder for the person to live a good life. The second idea also says that if we let any one act toward another as a thing that does not have thoughts and cannot feel, then all people may end up being hurt more often.

Third, the thinking behind these ideas is clear and makes sense. It rests on what we see in real life: when people are used in that way, they often feel sad, angry, or hurt, and the group around them can feel less safe. The thinking also fits the way most of us want to act: we want to act in ways that do not cause hurt and that let each person feel they count. Because the ideas fit what we see and feel, the thinking can be called good. It points to a simple idea that we should act toward each person as a person, not as a thing that does not have thoughts and cannot feel, and that simple idea helps keep hurt low and keep good feeling high.

english_query: the idea that you should only follow rules everyone could agree to
ugf_response:
Think about how we live with other people. We must decide how to act so that we do not hurt each other. Some people think we should follow certain ways of doing things because they are good or because they are the right thing to do. But what if one person thinks something is good and another person thinks it is bad? If we use those ideas to make our ways of doing things, we will fight all the time. We will not be able to agree on how to live together.

There is a different way to think about this. Instead of asking if a way of doing things is good or bad, we should ask if everyone could say yes to it. Imagine that every person who lives in a place sits down together. They want to make a set of ways of doing things that everyone must follow. This set of ways will make sure that things are even and that no one gets more than they should.

When a person makes a new way of doing things, they must ask themselves a question. They must ask if every other person could say yes to that way of doing things. If the way of doing things only helps one person or only helps one group of people, then other people will say no. If the way of doing things makes life hard or bad for others while making it good for one, people will not say yes.

A way of doing things is only good to follow if it is something that all people could say yes to at the same time. If you make a way of doing things that you would not want others to use on you, then you cannot say that it is a way that everyone could say yes to. If everyone could say yes to it, then it is even. This way of thinking helps us find ways to live together without fighting about what is good or what is bad. We only follow the ways of doing things that we would let everyone else follow too.

english_query: when one person doing something first changes what others do
ugf_response: First, we look at a room where many people are sitting. One person stands up to stretch their legs. Then, another person sees this and thinks it is time to stand too. Soon, many people are standing. The hard question here is why the second person changed what they were doing. Some people say the second person did it because they wanted to be like the first person. They think people like to do the same things as others so they feel part of the group. Others say the second person did it because they thought the first person knew something they did not. Maybe the first person heard a noise or felt the room getting hot. So the second person did the very same thing to stay safe or feel good in their body. This shows that when one person acts, others may change what they do not just because they want to, but because they are trying to guess what is best to do. We can see that what we do can push others to change, even if we do not ask them to. This makes us think about how much power one person has over the group just by moving or acting first.

english_query: why some things you must never do to another person no matter what
ugf_response: First, we think about how people live together in a group. Second, we see that if one person hurts another person to get what they want, the group will break into pieces. Third, we look at what happens if we say it is okay to hurt someone if it helps many other people. We see that this way of thinking makes everyone feel afraid because no one is safe. The thing after the third thing, we see that if we want to live in a world where we are all free and can make our own choices, we must say that some things are always wrong. The thing after that, we see that if we do not have these things that are always wrong, then no one has a real way to live well. The thing after that, we see that we must act toward each person as a thing that is very great in its own way and not just as a thing to be used to get what we want. This is how we keep the world from becoming a place of fear and pain.

english_query: the idea that we are all connected and need each other
ugf_response: The first idea is that all people are tied together in some way. The person says this is true. They believe we do not live alone but are part of a big group where one part changes the other. The second idea is that because we are tied together, we must help each other. The person thinks this follows from the first idea. They believe that if we are tied to each other, then we have a job to do to care for one another. The thinking here is good in a simple way. If we are really tied together, then hurting one part can hurt the whole. So it makes sense to look out for each other. However, the first idea is not always clear. Some people are more tied to some groups than others. So the jump from being tied to needing help might be too fast. But for the most part, the tie between being tied and needing help is a strong one.

english_query: how to think about what is fair when people start in different places
ugf_response:
The person is talking about how to think about what is right when people do not start their lives in the same way. The first idea they give is that people are born into different ways of living. Some people have much and some people have very little. This is a thing that is true in our world. Some people have many good things and some people do not have enough to live well. This is a part of life that we can see.

The second idea is what they think comes from this first idea. They say that if we want things to be right, we must look at where people start. They think that we cannot say things are right just because we act toward everyone in the same way right now. If one person starts with much and another starts with nothing, acting toward them in the same way will not make things right. They think we must look at the start to know if the end is good.

The third idea is whether the way they think is good. We must look at how they move from the first idea to the second idea. The way they think is good because it looks at the whole story of a person and not just one moment in time. However, it is hard to know how much we should change things to make them right. It is hard to know how much help is enough. We must be very careful when we try to make things right for everyone.

english_query: why everyone doing what is best for them can make things worse for all
ugf_response:
Person one: Why does it go bad when every person only does what is good for themselves?

Person two: It goes bad because when everyone tries to get the most for themselves, they take too much from the world.

Person one: But is it not good to want what is best for your own life?

Person two: It is good for you, but if everyone thinks the same way at the same time, the things we all need will run out. Imagine a group of people in a field with one big piece of food that people eat. If every person tries to grab the biggest piece for themselves, they will fight and break the food so that no one can eat it.

Person one: So, if I try to use my mind to get more than I should, I might make things bad for the whole group?

Person two: Yes. If you try to get more than your part, you make it harder for others to get what they need. When everyone does this, the whole group feels much pain more than if everyone had just taken a small part that was right for everyone. The thing that is good for one person can be bad for the whole group when many people do it at once.

english_query: the problem with thinking you know more than you really do
ugf_response:
Sometimes a person thinks they know a lot about how the world works. They feel sure that their thoughts are right. This feeling can be a bad thing. It happens when a person does not see what they do not know. They think their mind is full of truth, but there are many things they have not seen or felt. This makes them stop looking for new things. They stop asking if they are wrong.

The hard question is how a person can know if their own mind is telling them the truth or if it is making things up to make them feel good. How can we tell if we are seeing the world as it is, or if we are only seeing what we want to see? This is hard because our own minds are the things we use to look at everything else. We cannot step outside of our own heads to check our work.

Some people say we should always not be sure about everything we think. They say we should act as if we know nothing at all. This can help us find the truth, but it can also make it hard to do anything. If you do not trust your own mind, you might not be able to make a choice or move forward. You might stay stuck in a place of never knowing.

Other people say we should trust what we know, but we must always be ready to change our minds. They say we should look for things that show we are wrong. If we find something that does not fit with what we thought, we should not throw it away. Instead, we should change our thoughts to fit the new thing. This way, we grow. We move from a small truth to a bigger truth.

There is also a way to look at this that says we must be careful about how much we say we know. We should say we are sure only when we have seen many things that say the same thing. We should not be quick to say we have the answer. By being slow and careful, we can avoid the place where we think we have more things in our heads than we really do. This helps us stay open to the world.

english_query: why the rules should be the same for everyone
ugf_response:
Person number one: Why must we have the same ways of doing things for every person?

Person number two: If we have one set of ways that stays the same for all, then no one can get more than another person just because they are rich or strong.

Person number one: But what if some people are different? Does it not make sense to have different ways for different people?

Person number two: If we change the ways for some, then the people in power can pick who gets the easy way and who gets the hard way. This makes it so that the way things work is not what everyone should get.

Person number one: I see. So you are saying that if the ways are not the same, then the people with the most power will use them to hurt others?

Person number two: Yes. When the ways are the same for everyone, every person can know what to expect. It makes the world a place where we can trust that the ways will not change just to help one person and hurt another.

english_query: the way to help yourself think about hard questions step by step
ugf_response: First, we must look at the big question and break it into small parts that are easy to see. Second, we must find the things that we know are true and the things that we only think might be true. Third, we look at how the small parts go together and how one thing can lead to another. The step after the third step is to check our own thoughts to see if we are doing something wrong in how we see things. The step after that is to look at the things we found to see if they answer the big question. Finally, we write down what we found so we can look at it again later.

english_query: how to decide whose good matters and how much
ugf_response:
Imagine a world where you must choose which man or woman to help when you can only help one. You see two people who are in bad trouble. One person is a young child who has many years of life ahead. The other person is an old man who has lived a long time and has done much for other people. You have only enough food or things that make the body well to save one of them. This is a hard thing to think about because it feels wrong to let someone die when you could have saved them.

The big question is how we decide which person is more important. We want to know how to find the size of the good that a person brings to the world. We want to know how much weight to give to the life of a person when we must choose between them. There is no easy way to see this or to count it like we count things we eat or stones.

First, some people might say we should save the young child. They think that because the child has many years left, the child can do many more good things in the future. They look at the time that is left. They think that more time means more good can happen. To them, the part of life left is the most important thing to look at.

Second, other people might say we should save the old man. They think that what a person has already done for the world matters most. The old man has helped many people and has built many things. They believe that the good he has already done is a reason to keep him alive. They look at the past to decide what to do in the now.

Third, some might say that every person is as great as any other. They think it is not for us to say one life is better than another. They believe that we cannot use numbers to find the good in people because every life is a special thing that cannot be known by counting. They think that trying to pick a person who is better is a bad way to live. Each of these ways of thinking has a reason that sounds right, but they all lead to different choices.

english_query: the question of what we owe to people we will never meet
ugf_response:
Person number one: I have a thought that makes my head hurt. Do we have to care about people we will never see?

Person number two: That is a very big thought. Many people think we do.

Person number one: But why? If I do not know them, and they do not know me, why should I do things to help them?

Person number two: Think about it this way. If we only care about the people we see, the world will become a very bad place. We must think about the people who will live after we are gone.

Person number one: So you mean people who are not born yet? How can I care about someone who is not here yet?

Person number two: You care by making sure the world stays good for them. If you take everything now and leave nothing, you are being bad to them. You are making their life hard before they even start.

Person number one: I see. So it is like when we use a thing and we must make sure it is still good for the next person who wants to use it.

Person number two: Yes. That is a good way to say it. We have a thing we must do to leave the world in a state where others can live well. Even if they are far away or not born yet, their lives matter.

english_query: the problem of spending more just because you already spent a lot
ugf_response: First, we see a person who starts to give away their money for something. Second, we see that this person has already given away a large bit of money. Third, the person feels that they must keep giving away more money even if it is not a good way to use it. This happens because the person thinks about the money they have already lost. They think that if they stop now, the money they already gave away was a bad thing. But if they keep giving more, they might get something good back. This is a bad way to think because it makes the person lose even more money. The person is not looking at what they will lose next. Instead, they only look at what they have already lost. This makes them make bad choices that hurt them more and more.

english_query: what it means for a case to be put together well
ugf_response: To tell about why someone should believe a thing is true, you must start with what you know is true. First, you look at the things you see and the things people tell you. Second, you must make sure these things are not wrong or made up. Third, you take these true things and put them together in a way that makes sense. You must show that if these things are true, then the new thing you want people to believe must also be true. The step after the third step is that you must make sure you are not using bad ways of thinking that lead to a wrong answer. You must show that your way of thinking is good and that it does not have holes where wrong things can get in. The step after that is that you must show that there are no other ways to explain the things you see that would make your new thing not true. If you do all these things, then the way you put your thoughts together is good.

english_query: how a person can change who they are by changing what they do
ugf_response:
Person 1: I wonder if I can be a new me if I do new stuff. How does that work?  
Person 2: When you start to do new things, your mind and heart can feel new. The things you do shape the way you think and feel, so you can become a new you.  
Person 1: So if I stop a repeated thing that makes me sad, will I feel less sad?  
Person 2: Yes. When you stop a repeated thing that brings sad, your brain stops getting the sad sign as often, and you can feel more quiet.  
Person 1: What if I start a repeated thing that makes me feel good, like walking each day?  
Person 2: Walking each day makes your body move, your heart beat, and your mind clear. Over time you may feel strong and more happy.  
Person 1: Does this mean I can change who I am just by changing what I do?  
Person 2: It means the things you do are like a picture that shows a new view of you. By picking new things, the view can move.  
Person 1: How can I keep the new view from going away?  
Person 2: Keep doing the new things many times. The more you do them, the more they become part of you, and the picture stays.

english_query: the problem of everyone using up something that belongs to all
ugf_response: First, we look at a thing that belongs to every person at the same time. This thing is not owned by one person alone, but everyone can use it. Second, we see that when one person uses this thing, there is less of it left for the people who come after. Third, we think about what happens when many people want to use the same thing at the same time. Each person wants to take as much as they can because they do not want to lose it to someone else. The step after the third step shows that if every person thinks this way, the thing will be gone very fast. The step after that shows that the thing will be used up before it can grow back or stay good for the long time. This is a bad thing because once the thing is gone, no one can use it anymore. This shows why it is hard to take care of things that belong to everyone.

english_query: how to check if your own thinking has problems
ugf_response:
When you sit and think about something, you can try a few ways to see if the thought you have may be not right. First, you can ask yourself a simple question: does this thought go with the facts that you see or hear? Look at the facts that you know about the thing. If the thought says something that does not fit with those facts, it may have a problem.

Second, you can see if the thought works in other places. Take a different case that is like the one you are thinking about. Does the same thought give a good answer there too? If it does not, that may show a problem in the thought.

Third, you can ask why the thought is true. Try to find a reason that makes the thought clear. If you cannot find a clear reason, try to ask what could be wrong with the thought. Look for a missing piece or a part that you may have taken for given without checking.

The next thing you can do is to ask another person. Tell the thought to a friend or a person you trust. Ask them if they see any part that does not look right. When another mind looks at your thought, they may see a problem that your own mind missed.

After that, you can write the thought down. When you write, you can look at each line and see if any line says something that is not true or does not fit with the facts. You can also look for places where you used a word that means “always” or “never”. Those words often hide a problem because few things are really always or never that way.

The next thing is to try a small thing you do. Take a simple thing you do that would happen if the thought were true. See what you get. If what you get is not what you expected, the thought may have a problem.

Finally, you can think about how you would feel if the thought turned out to be wrong. Would it change a lot of other thoughts you have? If it would, you may need to look at those other thoughts too, because a problem in one place can make a problem in other places.

When you have gone through these ways, you will have a better idea of whether your own thinking has a problem. If you find a problem, you can change the part that is not right, add a missing piece, or look for a new reason that fits the facts. By doing this again and again, you can keep your thoughts as clear as possible.

english_query: the problem of using what was to guess what will be
ugf_response:
Person number one: I want to know about the problem with using what happened before to guess what will happen next.

Person number two: The problem is that the world is always changing. What was true in the past may not be true in the future.

Person number one: Why can we not just look at the past to see what things do?

Person number two: You can look, but you cannot see things that have never happened before. If a new thing comes into the world, the old ways of looking at it will not work.

Person number one: Is it because the things that happen are not always the same?

Person number two: Yes. Sometimes a small change in one thing can make a huge change in everything else. The old ways do not show you how these new changes will move.

Person number one: So, if we use the past to make a guess, can we be wrong?

Person number two: We can be very wrong. We might think we see a way that things go, but we are only seeing the way they went before. We are not seeing the way they are going now.

english_query: when one person doing something first changes what others do
ugf_response:
Think about a group of people in a room. Each person wants to do something. When the first person starts to do something, the other people see it. Because they see it, they change what they do. This is how one person can change the way all the other people act.

First, we must look at how people think. People often look at what others are doing to decide what is good or what is right. If one person starts to walk in a certain way, the other people might think that is the way they should walk too. They do not do it because they were told to, but because they saw it happen.

Second, we see that the first person sets a path. Imagine a field of tall grass. If one person walks through the grass, they make a path. Now, when other people come to that same place, they will walk in that same path. They do not have to think about where to go. The first person has already made the way for them.

Third, we see that this can happen with ideas. If one person says an idea is true, it can make other people believe it is true too. Even if the idea is not true, the fact that someone said it can change how the whole group thinks. The first person acts as a starting point.

This means that the first person has a lot of power. They do not need to tell people what to do. They only need to do something, and the others will follow or change their own way so that they are the same as the first person. This is how things start to move in a group. One person starts, and then the whole group moves together in a new way.

english_query: why being good at being a person is like being good at anything else
ugf_response:
Being good at being a person is a kind of doing well at a thing, just like being good at any other thing you try. First, when you try to be a good person you need to learn how to act, how to think, and how to feel in ways that help you and help others. You watch how other people act, you try to make like the parts that seem kind, and you see what works and what does not. When you see that a word you used made someone sad, you learn to change that word next time. This is the same as when you learn to play a game or to make food. You watch someone else do it, you try it yourself, you see if it goes well, and you try again. 

Second, you need to keep doing the thing over and over. Each time you try to be kind, to be telling the truth, to be calm, you get a little better because your mind and your heart get used to the new ways. This is the same as when you keep making a picture or keep making a pile. 

Third, you need help from other people. When a friend tells you that you made a good choice, you feel that the way you do things can be used again. When a friend tells you that you made a bad choice, you feel that you can change it. This is like a teacher who tells you when you are close to the point you want and when you are far. You use that talk to move your own things you do nearer to what you want. 

The next part, you need to know why you do the thing. You think about what you want for yourself and for the people around you. You think about what will make you feel safe and what will make others feel safe. This thinking is the same as when you think about why you want to win a game or why you want to finish a job. The thinking helps you pick the right moves. 

In all of these parts – watching, trying, getting help, and thinking – being good at being a person works the same way as being good at any other thing. The only not the same is the form of the thing you are working on. The form may be about how you act toward others, but the way you learn, do many times, and grow is the same as the way you learn, do many times, and grow at any other thing. So being good at being a person is not a something not known; it is just another kind of doing well by using the same steps that help you do well at anything else.

english_query: why the way a question is asked can change the answer you give
ugf_response:
Imagine you are asking a person about a thing. You want to know what they think about that thing. You think you are being good and not taking a side. You think you are asking in a way that lets them tell you what is real. But the way you put your words together might change what they say. This is a very big thing to think about. It means that the way we talk can change how we see the world.

The hard question is this. Can we ever know what a person thinks if the way we ask them changes their mind? If the words we use pull them in one way or the other, are we finding out what is real, or are we just finding out what our own words made them say?

Some people might say that this does not matter much. They might say that if you ask many different ways, you will find the truth in the middle. They think that even if one way of asking is a bit bad, the truth is strong and will come out if you keep trying. They believe that people can see through the way a question is built.

Other people might say that this is a very big problem. They think that once you use certain words, you have already changed the person. They believe that the mind is not a thing that stays the same. It moves and changes when it meets new words. If you use words that make someone feel good or bad, they will answer in a way that fits those feelings. To these people, there is no way to ask a question that is free of its own shape.

We see this when we ask about things that are good or bad. If you ask if a thing is good, the person will look for good things. If you ask if a thing is bad, they will look for bad things. The question itself acts like a light that only shows one part of the room. It does not show the whole room. It only shows what the light hits. This makes it very hard to see the whole truth.

english_query: why we should be careful about thinking everything happens for a reason
ugf_response:
When a person thinks that all things happen because there is some big why, the thought can feel safe. It can make the mind feel that there is a shape or a plan behind each turn of life. That feeling can help a mind stay calm when a hard thing happens. But it is also good to take care of that thought and not let it run too far.

First, the thought that every turn has a big why can stop a mind from looking for the real cause that we can see. If a child falls down a step, a mind that says “it must be for a big why” may not look for the step that is not even or the shoe that does not fit well. The mind may miss the chance to fix the step or to put on a better shoe. In that way the thought can keep us from doing a thing that can make the next turn safer.

Second, the thought can make a mind point at people or groups as if they are the one who made the big why. When a person loses a job, a mind that says “it is for a big why” may point at the person who tells people what to do, the place where work happens, or the whole town. That point can hurt the way we feel about those people. It can make us feel angry or sad about them, even when the real cause may be a change in money, a thing that says what we should do, or a change in need. The hurt that comes from pointing can make the world feel more not together.

Third, the thought can keep a mind from asking what we can do now. If a storm breaks a house, a mind that says “it must be for a big why” may stay in a place of waiting, hoping the why will make sense later. In that waiting time, we may not take care of the broken top part of a house, may not move things to keep them dry, and may not ask for help. The house can get more hurt, and the people inside can get more hurt. Looking for ways we can act now, even if we do not see a big why, can keep more things safe.

It is also good to remember that many things are just the thing that comes after many small parts moving together. A ball rolls because of a push, a wind blows because of heat, a green thing that lives grows because of water and light. Those small parts do not need a big why to work. Seeing the small parts can help a mind understand how the world works and can help us make better choices.

So, it is fine to hold the thought that there may be a big why, but we should also take care to look for the real cause we can see, to not point at people in a way that hurts, and to act in the now. By doing that, we keep our mind calm, keep our world safer, and keep our hearts from being hurt by wrong points. This careful act of keeping two things even lets us stay open to both the feeling of a big why and the clear work of the small parts that we can see and change.

english_query: how to build your own set of rules for making hard choices
ugf_response:
You sit with a big feeling that you must choose a way to act when you face a choice that feels hard. The feeling comes because there are many things you could think about – what you want, what will help you, what will hurt you, what other people think, what will stay with you later. The hard thing is that there is no one clear path that fits every time, so you ask yourself how to make a small group of ideas you can turn to when a hard choice comes up.

One way people think about this is to write down a few ideas that feel true for them and then try to follow those ideas each time they must choose. Some say it is good to start with what you need most right now – things like staying safe, keeping love, or keeping a promise. They say that if you keep those needs at the front of your mind, the choice will line up with what matters most to you. Others say it is better to think about what will make the most good for the most people, even if it means you give up a little of what you want. They feel that looking at the wider group helps keep you from being too caught up in just your own part of the story.

A different group of people say you should first look at what you feel inside – the big feeling, the calm or the worry – and let that feeling lead you. They think that the feeling from inside is a kind of picture that points to the right way for you, because it comes from the many tiny things you have lived through. Yet another set of voices say you should ask a friend or a family member and see what they think. They feel that a second set of eyes can catch places you cannot see that you might miss on your own.

Why do these different ideas appear? One reason is that each person lives in a world that looks a little different. Some have a life that is mostly about work, some about family, some about learning. Because the world looks different, the ideas that feel true to them also look different. Another reason is that the feeling of being stuck can come from many places – fear, hope, love, a thing you feel you must do – and each of those feelings pulls you in a different direction. So the help you build may need to hold a set of those pulls, and the set will look different for each person.

What you can do is first notice the feeling that makes you stop and think. Then you can ask yourself a few simple things: What do I need most right now? Who will feel the most from what I do? What does my deep feeling say? Who can I ask to help see the whole? Write the answers down in a short set that you can look at when a hard choice shows up. Over time you can see if the short set helps you feel less stuck, and you can add or change the ideas as you learn more about what works for you. In this way you make a small set of ideas that belong to you, and you have a way to use them when the next hard choice comes.
